AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.title: Oracle: Inspiration
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.description:
Generate a derived card from prefix, infix, and suffix settings.
Can switch to AI mode in mod config.
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.upgraded_description:
Generate a derived card from prefix, infix, and suffix settings.
Can switch to AI mode in mod config.
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.title: Oracle: Wish
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.instructions:
What effect do you want? (e.g. 80 [gold]Block[/gold], draw 3 cards, 2 Strength)
AI will understand your request and generate a card effect.

AICARDMOD-DEFEND_CARD.title: Defend

AICARDMOD-BLINDING_LIGHT_CARD.title: Blinding Light
AICARDMOD-BLINDING_LIGHT_CARD.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {AICARDMOD-MisstepGain:diff()} [gold]Misstep[/gold] to the enemy.
AICARDMOD-BLINDING_LIGHT_CARD.upgraded_d:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {AICARDMOD-MisstepGain:diff()} [gold]Misstep[/gold] to the enemy.
AICARDMOD-CHASTISEMENT_CARD.title: Chastisement
AICARDMOD-CHASTISEMENT_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, hit twice.
AICARDMOD-CHASTISEMENT_CARD.upgraded_des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, hit twice.
AICARDMOD-CONFESSIONAL_CARD.title: Confessional
AICARDMOD-CONFESSIONAL_CARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status cards; draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} [gold]Revelation[/gold] per card exhausted.
AICARDMOD-CONFESSIONAL_CARD.upgraded_des:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status cards; draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} [gold]Revelation[/gold] per card exhausted.
AICARDMOD-DISCIPLINE_CARD.title: Discipline
AICARDMOD-DISCIPLINE_CARD.description: The next Attack you play this turn deals {AICARDMOD-TemporaryStrengthPower:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-DISCIPLINE_CARD.upgraded_descr: The next Attack you play this turn deals {AICARDMOD-TemporaryStrengthPower:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-GUIDING_LAMP_CARD.title: Guiding Lamp
AICARDMOD-HYMN_LEAD_CARD.title: Hymn Lead
AICARDMOD-IGNITE_INSPIRATION_CARD.title: Ignite Inspiration
AICARDMOD-IGNITE_INSPIRATION_CARD.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For every {AICARDMOD-RevelationStep:diff()} [gold]Revelation[/gold], deal {BonusPerThree:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-IGNITE_INSPIRATION_CARD.upgrad:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For every {AICARDMOD-RevelationStep:diff()} [gold]Revelation[/gold], deal {BonusPerThree:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_ARC_CARD.title: Light Arc
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_ARC_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have at least {AICARDMOD-LightArcFaithSpend:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold], spend {AICARDMOD-LightArcFaithSpend:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold] to deal {BonusDamage:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_ARC_CARD.upgraded_descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have at least {AICARDMOD-LightArcFaithSpend:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold], spend {AICARDMOD-LightArcFaithSpend:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold] to deal {BonusDamage:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-MEDITATION_CARD.title: Meditation
AICARDMOD-MEDITATION_CARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of next turn, draw {DrawNextTurn:diff()} extra cards.
AICARDMOD-MEDITATION_CARD.upgraded_descr:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of next turn, draw {DrawNextTurn:diff()} extra cards.
AICARDMOD-OFFERING_CARD.title: Offering
AICARDMOD-OFFERING_CARD.description:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
At the start of next turn, draw {Cards:inverseDiff()} fewer cards.
AICARDMOD-OFFERING_CARD.upgraded_descrip:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
At the start of next turn, draw {Cards:inverseDiff()} fewer cards.
AICARDMOD-PILGRIMAGE_ROAD_CARD.title: Pilgrimage Road
AICARDMOD-PILGRIMAGE_ROAD_CARD.descripti: At the start of next turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} [gold]Revelation[/gold] and {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
AICARDMOD-PILGRIMAGE_ROAD_CARD.upgraded_: At the start of next turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} [gold]Revelation[/gold] and {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}.

Trigger [gold]Revelation[/gold] immediately.
Retain {AICARDMOD-RetainPercent:diff()}% of [gold]Revelation[/gold] after resolution.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

AICARDMOD-SAINT_STRIDE_CARD.upgraded_des: For each card you play this turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationPerCard:diff()} [gold]Revelation[/gold].

Gain [gold]Revelation[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.

AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_CARD.description: This turn, whenever that enemy takes damage, it takes {Damage:diff()} additional damage.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove all [gold]Misstep[/gold] from that enemy. Deal {AICARDMOD-BonusPerMisstep:diff()} additional damage per stack removed.

AICARDMOD-ENLIGHTENMENT_CARD.description:

AICARDMOD-ECHO_HYMN_CARD.description: After [gold]Revelation[/gold] resolves, retain {AICARDMOD-RetainPercent:diff()}% of its points.

Play the drawn cards that have [gold]Revelation[/gold] effects.

Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} [gold]Revelation[/gold].

AICARDMOD-HOLY_CHOIR_CARD.upgraded_descr: [gold]Revelation[/gold] now deals damage to all enemies.

AICARDMOD-APOCALYPTIC_DELUGE_CARD.descri:

[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to your current [gold]Revelation[/gold], then reset [gold]Revelation[/gold] to 0.

AICARDMOD-HOLY_WRATH_CARD.upgraded_descr:

AICARDMOD-DIVINE_WORD_CARD.upgraded_desc:
Deal {AICARDMOD-DmgPerCard:diff()} damage for each card played this turn.
Return this card to your hand.

AICARDMOD-ECHO_BLADE_CARD.description:
